prompt:
Full-body 2D illustration of a grim chef assassin, walking forward, centered, transparent background (PNG, no background).

Wears a tattered white chef’s coat and slouched damaged chef hat, heavily worn, stained, frayed, patched. Deep red scarf loosely wrapped, trailing, barely covering a very deep healed cut-throat scar, most of the neck wound clearly visible.

Face is severely mangled and partially unrecognizable, with heavy scarring, distorted asymmetrical features, rough scar tissue, and one sunken eye; expression blank and unsettling.

Forearms wrapped in dark red bandages. Holds a small kitchen knife pointed down; a large chef’s knife is strapped diagonally across the back with worn leather straps.

Wears dark trousers and rugged brown lace-up boots, worn and scuffed.

Style: hand-drawn 2D indie game art, Hollow Knight: Silksong–inspired, expressive ink lines, muted colors, soft painterly shading, slender proportions, dark fairy-tale tone.
Lighting: soft flat illustration.
